subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — I enjoyed our conversation at the conference as well, and I'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots for a 30-minute call:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best and I'll send a calendar invite.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information or personnel directory data. For senior-level outreach, please use the contact channels listed on our public website at https://www.company.internal, and the right people will be looped in.

Thanks, and looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards
